2605.21479.title: WikiVQABench: A Knowledge-Grounded Visual Question Answering Benchmark from Wikipedia and Wikidata
2605.21479.paper_summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) benchmarks have largely emphasized perception-based tasks that can be solved from visual content alone. In contrast, many real-world scenarios require external knowledge that is not directly observable in the image to answer correctly. We introduce WikiVQABench, a human-curated knowledge-grounded VQA benchmark constructed by systematically combining Wikipedia images, their associated article captions, and structured knowledge from Wikidata. Our pipeline uses large language models (LLMs) to generate candidate multiple-choice image-question-answer sets. All generated instances are subsequently reviewed and curated by human annotators to ensure factual correctness, visual-text consistency, and that each question requires external knowledge in addition to visual evidence for correct resolution. WikiVQABench comprises a substantial collection of Wikipedia images with curated multiple-choice questions designed to benchmark knowledge-aware vision-language models (VLMs). Evaluation of fifteen VLMs (256M-90B parameters) reveals a wide performance range (24.7%-75.6% accuracy), demonstrating that the benchmark effectively discriminates model capabilities on knowledge-intensive reasoning. The dataset and benchmarking code are publicly available.
2605.21479.paper_summary_zh: 視覺問題回答（VQA）基準主要強調可以僅從視覺內容解決的感知任務。相對而言，許多現實世界的情境需要外部知識，這些知識在圖像中並不可直接觀察，以便正確回答。我們介紹了WikiVQABench，這是一個由人類策劃的知識基礎VQA基準，通過系統性地結合維基百科圖像、其相關的文章標題和來自Wikidata的結構化知識而構建。我們的流程使用大型語言模型（LLMs）生成候選的多選圖像-問題-答案集。所有生成的實例隨後都由人類標註者進行審查和策劃，以確保事實正確性、視覺-文本一致性，以及每個問題除了視覺證據外還需要外部知識以進行正確解決。WikiVQABench包含大量維基百科圖像，並設計了策劃的多選問題，以基準測試知識感知的視覺-語言模型（VLMs）。對十五個VLM（256M-90B參數）的評估顯示出廣泛的性能範圍（24.7%-75.6%準確率），證明該基準有效區分模型在知識密集推理方面的能力。數據集和基準測試代碼均可公開獲得。
2605.21479.author: Basel Shbita et.al.
2605.21479.authors: Basel Shbita, Pengyuan Li, Anna Lisa Gentile
